parsed_output.justification: DeAndre initially claimed to be the Drunk, but when specifically asked by Brett whether he was 'wolfing' or 'drunken', he answered 'Wolfing'. Although this may have been intended as a joke, in the context of the game, it is a strong indicator of his role. Furthermore, the other three players (Ryan, Katie, and Brett) have converged on the conclusion that DeAndre is the most likely Werewolf or Minion, and DeAndre's attempts to deflect suspicion toward Brett are unconvincing.
